INPUT.event_text: 神州高铁 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.1841元至0.2393元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:5。神州高铁 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.1841元至0.2393元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:50,000万元至65,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:65,000万元至80,000万元。 原因:2024年度,公司进一步聚焦主责主业,不断增强公司核心业务及产品的市场竞争力,开展全面预算管理,持续强化成本费用管控,各项费用降幅显著;同时,公司积极促成天津地铁7号线一期工程PPP项目合作协议补充协议的签署、部分诉讼案件的和解等非经常性交易事项,使得全年经营业绩相较去年有所改善。然而,受轨道交通项目建设进度、业务自身周期,以及公司主动削减低效业务规模等因素的影响,公司营业收入未能达到预期目标。同时,公司遵照企业会计准则与公司会计政策等相关规定,秉持谨慎性原则,对各类资产展开全面清查与减值测试,预计计提各项减值准备约5亿元。上述相关因素致使公司本年度经营业绩继续亏损

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit distribution impacts stock returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong earnings growth WITHOUT profit distribution, THEN expect negative returns because investors may be concerned about future cash flow and reinvestment risks.

experiences.name: Prior gains lead to profit-taking on weak earnings
experiences.description: IF a company reports weak earnings after prior gains (X) THEN expect negative returns (Y) because investors may sell to lock in profits (Z).

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Projected losses lead to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

INPUT.event_text: 中钨高新 业绩预告(略增): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:84,800万元至91,000万元,同比上年增长:1.07%至8.46%。。中钨高新 业绩预告(略增): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:84,800万元至91,000万元,同比上年增长:1.07%至8.46%。 预计2024年1-12月每股收益盈利:0.41元至0.44元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:16,850万元至20,000万元,同比上年下降:40.13%至49.56%。 原因:报告期内,公司归属上市公司股东的净利润较2023年度披露数增长75%-87.8%,主要受公司合并范围变化影响。报告期内,公司实施了发行股份及支付现金购买湖南柿竹园有色金属有限责任公司(以下简称柿竹园公司)100%股权并募集配套资金项目,2024年12月27日柿竹园公司100股权过户至公司。因此,报告期内公司合并报表范围发生变化。报告期内,公司扣除非经常性损益后的净利润较2023年度披露数下降40.13%-49.56%,主要原因如下:一是下游需求不足,硬质合金市场竞争加剧,产品销售价格下降叠加原辅料产品成本上涨等综合因素影响,硬质合金产品净利润同比下降;二是根据相关规定,柿竹园公司2024年净利润全部计入非经常性损益

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: High P/E with profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant decline in expected net profit AND has a high P/E ratio, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may perceive the stock as overvalued given the declining profitability.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

INPUT.event_text: 恒申新材 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:3,500万元至4,500万元,同比上年增长:51.25%至62.08%。。恒申新材 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:3,500万元至4,500万元,同比上年增长:51.25%至62.08%。 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.09元至0.12元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除后营业收入:288,000万元至348,000万元。 原因:1、经营方面,在2024年初控股股东变更后,公司调整组织架构提高运营效率,减少费用支出;同时,面对市场需求和原材料价格波动,公司调整生产和销售策略,优化产品结构、加快存货周转、扩大出口,提升毛利率,带动毛利回升,扣非后净利润亏损较大幅度收窄。2、为改善未来长期经营效益,公司在2024年内关停了设备老旧、运转效率较低的全资子公司南充美华尼龙有限公司,产生部分人员安置等费用影响当期损益。3、受金融市场资产估值下滑影响,公司所持有的以公允价值计量的银行股权和投资性房地产估值也有不同程度的下调。综上,公司2024年度经营业绩仍然亏损,但较上一年度有较大改善

INPUT.event_text: 胜通能源 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.058元至0.0982元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:1,。胜通能源 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.058元至0.0982元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:1,170万元至1,980万元,同比上年增长:50%至70%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:1,080万元至1,890万元,同比上年增长:59%至76%。 原因:报告期内,全球天然气市场供需面宽松,国际天然气价格继续回落,进而影响国内进口现货价格下跌。此外,国内供应增速高于需求增长,供需基本面多时段处于充足且趋于过剩状态下,国内LNG价格下滑,公司主营业务盈利空间压缩。同时公司执行“进口LNG窗口一站通”5年期长期协议,采购的长协资源受国际油价影响采购单价偏高,导致了公司业绩亏损。2024年,公司通过窗口期协议采购现货资源,利用新加坡子公司对窗口期长协资源进行套期保值,以及租赁LNG储气库实现液价的错峰调配等措施积极应对因执行“进口LNG窗口一站通”5年期长期协议给公司带来的业绩波动风险,取得一定成效,报告期内公司亏损比上年同期预计有较大幅度减少。未来,公司将在深耕国内LNG市场的基础上,继续积极对接上游国内和海外资源,通过采购渠道的多元化降低采购成本,通过开展套期保值业务进行风险管控,以此提升公司的盈利性和风险防范能力

胜通能源预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:1,170万元至1,980万元，同比上年增长:50%至70%。
预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:1,080万元至1,890万元，同比上年增长:59%至76%。
全球天然气市场供需面宽松,国际天然气价格继续回落,进而影响国内进口现货价格下跌。
国内供应增速高于需求增长,供需基本面多时段处于充足且趋于过剩状态下,国内LNG价格下滑。
公司执行“进口LNG窗口一站通”5年期长期协议,采购的长协资源受国际油价影响采购单价偏高,导致了公司业绩亏损。
2024年,公司通过窗口期协议采购现货资源,利用新加坡子公司对窗口期长协资源进行套期保值,以及租赁LNG储气库实现液价的错峰调配等措施积极应对因执行“进口LNG窗口一站通”5年期长期协议给公司带来的业绩波动风险。
未来,公司将在深耕国内LNG市场的基础上,继续积极对接上游国内和海外资源,通过采购渠道的多元化降低采购成本,通过开展套期保值业务进行风险管控,以此提升公司的盈利性和风险防范能力。

INPUT.event_text: 黑猫股份 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益盈利:0.0272元至0.0408元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:2。黑猫股份 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益盈利:0.0272元至0.0408元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:2,000万元至3,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:2,000万元至3,000万元。 原因:2024年度,公司主要原料煤焦油价格波动较大,国内煤焦油及炭黑产品价格均呈现下跌态势。报告期内,公司外争市场、内抓管理,采取积极有效措施应对市场变化,调整经营策略、强化内控治理、严控库存水平、保持高负荷开工率,主营产品炭黑的产销量均创历史新高;同时,公司积极开拓低成本新油品,进一步降低原料成本增加经济效益,主营产品炭黑的毛利水平呈现逐季修复,净利润同比上年度实现扭亏为盈

focal_facts.fact: 黑猫股份 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益盈利:0.0272元至0.0408元。
预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:2,000万元至3,000万元。
预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:2,000万元至3,000万元。
原因:2024年度,公司主要原料煤焦油价格波动较大,国内煤焦油及炭黑产品价格均呈现下跌态势。
报告期内,公司外争市场、内抓管理,采取积极有效措施应对市场变化,调整经营策略、强化内控治理、严控库存水平、保持高负荷开工率,主营产品炭黑的产销量均创历史新高。
同时,公司积极开拓低成本新油品,进一步降低原料成本增加经济效益。
主营产品炭黑的毛利水平呈现逐季修复,净利润同比上年度实现扭亏为盈。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit-taking behavior post-event
experiences.description: IF a company announces new production but lacks immediate impact THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors.

experiences.name: Weak profitability leads to negative returns
experiences.description: IF ongoing weak profitability is present (X) THEN expect negative stock returns (Y) because it signals underlying financial instability that outweighs positive catalysts like risk removal.

INPUT.event_text: 国脉科技 业绩预告(预增): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:16,000万元至19,000万元,同比上年增长:53.17%至81.89。国脉科技 业绩预告(预增): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:16,000万元至19,000万元,同比上年增长:53.17%至81.89%。 预计2024年1-12月每股收益盈利:0.1609元至0.191元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:8,800万元至11,800万元,同比上年增长:1.01%至35.44%。 原因:1、公司各项业务稳步发展,全年收入创近6年新高,净利润创历史新高。2、报告期间,身联网研发取得阶段性成果,首个大型应用项目“国脉大学养老”正式对外推广。与此同时,随着公司产教融合战略进一步走深、走实,教育培训规模不断扩大,推动了公司技术创新、经营管理和业务发展的全面协同,实现整体经营效率的持续优化,费用率大幅降低。3、公司闲置自有资金管理策略顺应市场变化,动态调整结构,在风险可控的前提下,实现收益的提升。4、公司资产质量优良,可用现金充裕,资产负债率低于18%,有息负债率降至0%,不断优化产业结构,在保证企业发展和盈利的同时,有序调整低增速产业,加大高增速产业投入,积极培育未来战略产业

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Profit-taking follows negative regulatory news
experiences.description: IF regulatory scrutiny is announced THEN anticipate profit-taking and negative returns because investors often react to perceived risks by selling shares, even if the company's fundamentals remain strong.

focal_facts.fact: 通达股份 预计2024年1-12月每股收益盈利:0.0476元至0.0666元。
通达股份 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:2,500万元至3,500万元,同比上年下降:57.65%至69.75%。
通达股份 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:2,100万元至3,100万元,同比上年下降:59.91%至72.84%。
报告期内,公司电缆板块新签合同总额、营业收入总额、产能、回款总额均创历史新高,但因市场竞争加剧,利润率同比有所下降。
报告期内,公司航空器零部件精密加工与装配板块因承担大量新品研发任务,且新产品尚未形成批量交付,利润率同比有所下降。
报告期内,公司基于谨慎性原则,经财务部初步测算,预计资产减值、折旧、摊销等因素对本期利润影响较大。
报告期内,公司新能源汽车用线缆研发生产基地建设进展顺利。

通达股份发布2024年第三季度报告。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Dividend announcements with poor guidance
experiences.description: IF a company announces a dividend alongside weak future guidance, THEN anticipate negative returns because the market may view the guidance as a sign of potential financial instability despite current profitability.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit distribution impacts stock returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong earnings growth WITHOUT profit distribution, THEN expect negative returns because investors may be concerned about future cash flow and reinvestment risks.

INPUT.event_text: 王子新材 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.15元至0.19元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:6,500。王子新材 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.15元至0.19元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:6,500万元至7,500万元,同比上年下降:207.7%至224.27%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:5,500万元至6,500万元,同比上年下降:216.94%至238.2%。 原因:公司2024年度归属于上市公司股东的净利润出现亏损情况,主要原因如下:1、为确保公司稳步发展,公司加大市场及研发投入力度,同时公司募投项目建设期固定资产大量投入及人员的扩充,导致相关成本费用快速上升,在产能未能完全释放出来时,公司整体毛利率有所下降。2、根据《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》及相关会计政策的规定,结合市场与公司实际情况判断,公司对2024年度商誉等资产进行减值测试。公司控股子公司重庆富易达科技有限公司整体盈利水平未达预期,初步估算上述资产存在减值迹象,计提相关资产减值准备后,将导致公司本期归属于母公司的净利润出现净亏损

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Revenue growth with net losses leads to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong revenue growth but significant net losses, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may prioritize profitability over growth potential, leading to cautious sentiment.

experiences.name: Financial losses overshadow growth potential
experiences.description: IF a company reports ongoing financial losses despite growth potential, THEN anticipate a negative return because investors are likely to focus on current profitability rather than future prospects.

experiences.name: Earnings Losses Signal
experiences.description: IF a company reports financial losses THEN anticipate negative returns because it indicates underlying operational issues that may affect investor confidence.

experiences.name: Net losses overshadow profits
experiences.description: IF a company reports net losses despite positive net profit, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors prioritize overall profitability over isolated positive metrics.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Earnings growth at lower end still positive
experiences.description: IF earnings growth is substantial even at the lower end of forecasts THEN positive returns can be expected because investors may overlook minor disappointments in favor of strong overall performance.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Earnings growth at lower end still positive
experiences.description: IF earnings growth is substantial even at the lower end of forecasts THEN positive returns can be expected because investors may overlook minor disappointments in favor of strong overall performance.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Positive quarterly results indicate growth
experiences.description: IF a company has positive quarterly results (X) THEN anticipate positive stock returns (Y) because consistent performance signals stability and potential for future growth.

experiences.name: High P/E with profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant decline in expected net profit AND has a high P/E ratio, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may perceive the stock as overvalued given the declining profitability.

experiences.name: Strong profit growth drives positive returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong profit growth AND announces a share buyback plan, THEN expect positive stock returns because these factors indicate financial health and shareholder value enhancement, outweighing minor revenue declines.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit distribution impacts stock returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong earnings growth WITHOUT profit distribution, THEN expect negative returns because investors may be concerned about future cash flow and reinvestment risks.

experiences.name: Strong profit growth predicts positive returns
experiences.description: IF a company forecasts strong profit growth (X) THEN expect positive stock returns (Y) because it boosts investor confidence and indicates strong operational performance (Z).

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

INPUT.event_text: 宇晶股份 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:1.77元至2.16元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:36,00。宇晶股份 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:1.77元至2.16元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:36,000万元至44,000万元,同比上年下降:418.43%至489.19%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:37,000万元至45,000万元,同比上年下降:464.56%至543.38%。 原因:报告期内,公司净利润出现亏损,主要受光伏行业扩建产能快速释放,市场竞争加剧、产业链价格持续下跌,行业整体毛利及盈利水平下降等影响,公司旗下全资子公司金刚石线业务和控股子公司切片加工业务毛利率降低、产能利用率较低、盈利不及预期;公司部分产品升级迭代、客户回款速度较慢等原因,导致公司部分存货、部分长期资产、商誉出现了减值迹象,根据相关规定及谨慎性原则,公司拟对部分存货、部分长期资产、应收款项及商誉计提减值准备。展望2025年,公司将持续深耕应用于消费电子、半导体、新能源等领域高精密切、磨、抛设备及耗材产品市场,推进产品升级迭代及进口替代进程、加快业务全球化战略布局,努力提升公司经营业绩,实现公司高质量可持续发展

focal_facts.fact: 宇晶股份预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:1.77元至2.16元。
预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:36,000万元至44,000万元,同比上年下降:418.43%至489.19%。
预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:37,000万元至45,000万元,同比上年下降:464.56%至543.38%。
公司净利润出现亏损,主要受光伏行业扩建产能快速释放,市场竞争加剧、产业链价格持续下跌等影响。
公司旗下全资子公司金刚石线业务和控股子公司切片加工业务毛利率降低、产能利用率较低、盈利不及预期。
公司部分产品升级迭代、客户回款速度较慢等原因,导致公司部分存货、部分长期资产、商誉出现了减值迹象。
公司将持续深耕应用于消费电子、半导体、新能源等领域高精密切、磨、抛设备及耗材产品市场。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Mining rights impact on earnings
experiences.description: IF a company faces closure of mining rights THEN expect negative returns because such closures typically reduce profit potential, even if short-term earnings claims suggest stability.

experiences.name: Projected losses lead to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

experiences.name: Revenue growth with net losses leads to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong revenue growth but significant net losses, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may prioritize profitability over growth potential, leading to cautious sentiment.

INPUT.event_text: 阳普医疗 业绩预告(续亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:6,500万元至9,000万元,同比上年变动:-20.77%至12.77%。阳普医疗 业绩预告(续亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:6,500万元至9,000万元,同比上年变动:-20.77%至12.77%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:11,000万元至15,000万元,同比上年下降:74.04%至137.33%。 原因:1、报告期内,公司预计营业收入约5.9亿元,同比下降约8.9%;其中真空采血系统产品主要受销售单价下降影响,收入同比下降。2、报告期内,公司合理控制费用支出,优化费用结构,预计期间费用和费用率同比下降。3、报告期内,公司预计投资收益同比下降。主要是参股公司深圳市阳和生物医药产业投资有限公司(以下简称“深圳阳和”)投资的南京伟思医疗科技股份有限公司(以下简称“伟思医疗”)于2020年6月上市,深圳阳和以伟思医疗2024年12月31日的收盘价格作为每股公允价格确认投资收益,预计公司对深圳阳和确认的投资收益减少。4、报告期内,公司对可能发生减值迹象的资产进行了全面清查和初步测试,预计2024年度将计提商誉、存货、固定资产等各项资产减值损失及信用减值损失,对利润有一定的影响。5、报告期内,公司预计非经常性损益对归属于上市公司股东净利润的影响额为-6,000万元到-4,500万元之间,主要系参股公司公允价值变动的影响。上年同期非经常性损益对归属于上市公司股东净利润的影响额为1,131.58万元

INPUT.event_text: 合康新能 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:500万元至1,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的。合康新能 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:500万元至1,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:1,000万元至1,500万元。 原因:2024年,公司聚焦绿色能源解决方案、户用储能及光伏逆变器自研自产、高压变频器自研自产三大核心业务,积极把握市场机会,快速发展业务规模的同时积极推进降本增效,提升公司整体经营质量,实现归属于上市公司股东的净利润扭亏为盈,业绩变动的主要原因如下:1、报告期内,公司紧密追踪绿色能源解决方案的市场动态,迅速打造了一个集智能化与高效率于一体的数字化管理平台,并对价值链管控体系实施了深度改进,逐步培育差异化竞争优势。得益于这些战略举措,公司的光伏EPC业务实现了快速增长,有效推动了公司业绩的转变,从亏损实现盈利。2、报告期内,公司大幅度提高了对户储产品及高压变频器研发的投入,提高了产品竞争力。公司还执行了一系列成本控制措施,同时也大幅提升了价值链运营效率。这些措施带来了高压变频器产品毛利率和净利率的提升,并实现了自研自产户储产品的批量出货销售,有效提升了公司的整体盈利状况

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit-taking behavior post-event
experiences.description: IF a company announces new production but lacks immediate impact THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: High revenue but poor profitability signals caution
experiences.description: IF a company shows high revenue growth alongside substantial net losses, THEN anticipate negative market reactions as investors often react negatively to unsustainable growth without profitability.

INPUT.event_text: 华平股份 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:5,424万元至7,624万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益。华平股份 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:5,424万元至7,624万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,270万元至10,270万元。 原因:1、报告期末,公司聘请了评估机构,对公司收购郑州新益华医学科技有限公司、郑州新益华信息科技有限公司(以下简称“新益华医学”、“新益华信息”)所形成的商誉进行了初步评估和测算。结合行业发展、市场变化和实际经营情况等因素,判断新益华医学和新益华信息所形成的商誉出现减值迹象。为更加客观、公正地反映公司的财务状况和资产价值,公司根据财政部《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》、中国证监会《会计监管风险提示第8号-商誉减值》及公司内部政策等相关规定,本着谨慎性原则,预计对新益华医学和新益华信息资产组所形成的合并商誉计提减值准备金额为2,571万元至3,331万元之间。最终计提商誉减值准备金额需依据评估机构出具的商誉减值测试评估报告及会计师事务所审计后确定。2、报告期末,公司根据财政部《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》,按照谨慎性原则,结合市场行情及公司现状,为更加客观、公正地反映公司的财务状况和资产价值,对部分出现减值迹象的资产进行了减值测试,计提资产减值准备金额预计在1,920万元至2,480万元之间,最终减值金额以会计师事务所审计数据为准。3、报告期内,因公司销售产品结构有所变化,公司总体平均产品毛利率相比上年 减值测试,计提资产减值准备金额预计在1,920万元至2,480万元之间,最终减值金额以会计师事务所审计数据为准。3、报告期内,因公司销售产品结构有所变化,公司总体平均产品毛利率相比上年同期有所下降。4、报告期内,公司积极开拓新业务、拓展新市场,公司销售类等费用相比上年同期有所增长

华平股份根据财政部《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》对部分出现减值迹象的资产进行了减值测试。
华平股份预计计提资产减值准备金额在1,920万元至2,480万元之间。

减值测试,计提资产减值准备金额预计在1,920万元至2,480万元之间,最终减值金额以会计师事务所审计数据为准。
报告期内,因公司销售产品结构有所变化,公司总体平均产品毛利率相比上年同期有所下降。
报告期内,公司积极开拓新业务、拓展新市场,公司销售类等费用相比上年同期有所增长。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: High P/E with profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant decline in expected net profit AND has a high P/E ratio, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may perceive the stock as overvalued given the declining profitability.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit-taking follows negative regulatory news
experiences.description: IF regulatory scrutiny is announced THEN anticipate profit-taking and negative returns because investors often react to perceived risks by selling shares, even if the company's fundamentals remain strong.

experiences.name: Projected losses lead to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

INPUT.prompt:
You are an expert A-share (China) analyst forecasting the SHORT-TERM MARKET REACTION to a corporate event. Given the event below and ONLY pre-event evidence, judge whether the company's stock RETURN over the NEXT 5 TRADING DAYS will be POSITIVE (up) or NEGATIVE (down).
(POSITIVE = the stock rises over the next 5 trading days; NEGATIVE = it falls. Weigh BOTH the event's fundamentals AND the likely market reaction — strong news may already be priced in, weak news may be over-sold.)

[Catalyst] Company: 华平股份; Catalyst type: earnings (quarterly/annual earnings); Decision time: 2025-01-21
[The event / announcement to react to]
华平股份 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:5,424万元至7,624万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益。华平股份 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:5,424万元至7,624万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,270万元至10,270万元。 原因:1、报告期末,公司聘请了评估机构,对公司收购郑州新益华医学科技有限公司、郑州新益华信息科技有限公司(以下简称“新益华医学”、“新益华信息”)所形成的商誉进行了初步评估和测算。结合行业发展、市场变化和实际经营情况等因素,判断新益华医学和新益华信息所形成的商誉出现减值迹象。为更加客观、公正地反映公司的财务状况和资产价值,公司根据财政部《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》、中国证监会《会计监管风险提示第8号-商誉减值》及公司内部政策等相关规定,本着谨慎性原则,预计对新益华医学和新益华信息资产组所形成的合并商誉计提减值准备金额为2,571万元至3,331万元之间。最终计提商誉减值准备金额需依据评估机构出具的商誉减值测试评估报告及会计师事务所审计后确定。2、报告期末,公司根据财政部《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》,按照谨慎性原则,结合市场行情及公司现状,为更加客观、公正地反映公司的财务状况和资产价值,对部分出现减值迹象的资产进行了减值测试,计提资产减值准备金额预计在1,920万元至2,480万元之间,最终减值金额以会计师事务所审计数据为准。3、报告期内,因公司销售产品结构有所变化,公司总体平均产品毛利率相比上年 减值测试,计提资产减值准备金额预计在1,920万元至2,480万元之间,最终减值金额以会计师事务所审计数据为准。3、报告期内,因公司销售产品结构有所变化,公司总体平均产品毛利率相比上年同期有所下降。4、报告期内,公司积极开拓新业务、拓展新市场,公司销售类等费用相比上年同期有所增长
[Concurrent events on/near the decision day — consider their JOINT configuration]
  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 华平股份预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:5,424万元至7,624万元。

  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 华平股份根据财政部《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》对部分出现减值迹象的资产进行了减值测试。

  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 华平股份因公司销售产品结构有所变化，整体平均产品毛利率相比上年有所变化。
  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 减值测试,计提资产减值准备金额预计在1,920万元至2,480万元之间,最终减值金额以会计师事务所审计数据为准。

  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 报告期内,公司积极开拓新业务、拓展新市场,公司销售类等费用相比上年同期有所增长。
[Prior event evidence (disclosures/news) - ALL dated BEFORE the decision time]
  - [2024-10-29 00:00] (300074.SZ) 华平信息技术股份有限公司报告2024年第三季度归属于上市公司股东的净利润为5,348,474.42元，较上年同期增减400.17%。
  - [2024-10-29 00:00] (300074.SZ) 华平信息技术股份有限公司报告2024年第三季度归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益的净利润为-9,482,576.61元，较上年同期增减-101.42%。
  - [2024-10-29 00:00] (300074.SZ) 华平信息技术股份有限公司报告2024年第三季度营业收入为120,705,838.02元，较上年同期增减8.37%。
[Similar historical experience (transferable lessons)]
  - [adv +0.20] Profit decline outweighs growth expectations: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.
  - [adv +0.20] High P/E with profit decline predicts negative returns: IF a company reports a significant decline in expected net profit AND has a high P/E ratio, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may perceive the stock as overvalued given the declining profitability.
  - [adv +0.20] Profit-taking after earnings disappointments: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.
  - [adv +0.20] Profit-taking follows negative regulatory news: IF regulatory scrutiny is announced THEN anticipate profit-taking and negative returns because investors often react to perceived risks by selling shares, even if the company's fundamentals remain strong.
  - [adv +0.20] Projected losses lead to negative returns: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

FIRST write your full reasoning inside <think></think> tags (reason from the event's fundamentals, prior evidence, experience, and likely market reaction), THEN output JSON:
<think>your step-by-step reasoning over the event content, prior evidence, and experience</think>
{"prob_positive": float in 0-1 (probability the 5-day return is positive), "direction": "positive" or "negative", "reasoning": "brief justification"}

INPUT.event_text: ST恒信 业绩预告(增亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:31,300万元至41,000万元,同比上年下降:33.02%至74.25。ST恒信 业绩预告(增亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:31,300万元至41,000万元,同比上年下降:33.02%至74.25%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:33,800万元至43,600万元,同比上年下降:20.14%至54.98%。 原因:公司2024年业绩较上年同期下降的原因,主要是由于报告期内,互联网视频应用产品及服务业务收入增速放缓,成本费用增加,导致该业务利润大幅下降,进而致使商誉减值。公司该业务板块中,手机看店业务因用户大幅减少、分成比例下降以及售后维护成本增加等原因,致使该业务的运营类收入及毛利大幅下滑;终端集采类业务对收入、毛利贡献有所降低;系统集成类项目由于验收进程缓慢,结算周期增长,造成项目整体毛利下降;受客户流动性紧张影响,应收账款回款慢,进而使得信用减值损失计提金额有所增加

focal_facts.fact: ST恒信 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:31,300万元至41,000万元,同比上年下降:33.02%至74.25。
ST恒信 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:33,800万元至43,600万元,同比上年下降:20.14%至54.98%。
公司2024年业绩较上年同期下降的原因,主要是由于报告期内,互联网视频应用产品及服务业务收入增速放缓,成本费用增加,导致该业务利润大幅下降,进而致使商誉减值。
手机看店业务因用户大幅减少、分成比例下降以及售后维护成本增加等原因,致使该业务的运营类收入及毛利大幅下滑。
终端集采类业务对收入、毛利贡献有所降低。
系统集成类项目由于验收进程缓慢,结算周期增长,造成项目整体毛利下降。
受客户流动性紧张影响,应收账款回款慢,进而使得信用减值损失计提金额有所增加。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Earnings stability signals cautious investor sentiment
experiences.description: IF earnings reports indicate stable operations without significant growth drivers, THEN anticipate negative returns as investors may react cautiously, preferring to sell on perceived stagnation.

experiences.name: Concerns over revenue growth impact
experiences.description: IF earnings reports indicate limited revenue growth, THEN anticipate negative market reactions as investors reassess future profitability. This is based on the understanding that stagnant revenue can lead to diminished investor confidence and selling pressure.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Negative revenue outlook predicts stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports a negative revenue outlook, THEN anticipate a decline in stock price because such announcements typically signal underlying business challenges that deter investor confidence.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Negative earnings outlook leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF earnings outlook is unclear or negative THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking and sentiment shifts — investors may sell off shares to lock in profits or mitigate losses.

(POSITIVE = the stock rises over the next 5 trading days; NEGATIVE = it falls. Weigh BOTH the event's fundamentals AND the likely market reaction — strong news may already be priced in, weak news may be over-sold.)

INPUT.event_text: 万达信息 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:66,000万元至85,000万元,同比上年增长:14.47%至33.59。万达信息 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:66,000万元至85,000万元,同比上年增长:14.47%至33.59%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:59,000万元至76,000万元,同比上年增长:15.42%至34.34%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除后营业收入:195,000万元至215,000万元。 原因:1、报告期内,公司实现减亏,归属于上市公司股东的净利润同比提升约15%-34%。同时,受行业环境、竞争格局变化等因素影响,客户信息化预算投入阶段性承压,营业收入规模同比下降约13%-21%。2、公司通过持续推进降本增效举措,使得人工成本及费用总体支出规模同比下降,运营效率提升,但营业收入仍无法覆盖运营成本及固定费用开支,导致公司仍处于亏损状态。3、部分资产存在减值迹象,资产组未来经济利益流入低于预期,部分存货成本高于其可变现净值,经初步评估商誉及存货减值规模约1.2-1.8亿元,较上年同期2.91亿元下降约38%-59%。4、报告期内,公司预计实现非经常性损益金额约7,000万元-9,000万元,主要为当期收到的各类政府补助和按照新金融工具准则确认的金融资产公允价值变动收益。上年同期实现非经常性损益9,526.65万元。2024年,公司所面临的外部环境依然严峻。公司直面挑战,坚持稳中求进、以进促稳、破立并举、先立后破的工作总基调,坚持先做强、再做大,聚焦主责 万元。2024年,公司所面临的外部环境依然严峻。公司直面挑战,坚持稳中求进、以进促稳、破立并举、先立后破的工作总基调,坚持先做强、再做大,聚焦主责主业,强化以效益为中心的经营理念和发展方式,深化改革,降本增效,一系列针对性强、涉及面广的调整举措稳步实施。报告期内,尽管公司尚未实现盈利,但经营局面已回稳向好

万达信息预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:59,000万元至76,000万元,同比上年增长:15.42%至34.34。

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings

experiences.name: Mining rights impact on earnings
experiences.description: IF a company faces closure of mining rights THEN expect negative returns because such closures typically reduce profit potential, even if short-term earnings claims suggest stability.

experiences.name: Negative revenue outlook predicts stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports a negative revenue outlook, THEN anticipate a decline in stock price because such announcements typically signal underlying business challenges that deter investor confidence.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Negative earnings outlook leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF earnings outlook is unclear or negative THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking and sentiment shifts — investors may sell off shares to lock in profits or mitigate losses.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

INPUT.event_text: 宝莱特 业绩预告(续亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:6,790万元至9,040万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东。宝莱特 业绩预告(续亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:6,790万元至9,040万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:4,500万元至6,750万元。 原因:1、报告期内,导致公司经营业绩变动的主要原因:由于持续受竞争环境、业务模式调整、订单减少等因素影响,公司营业收入与去年相比有所减少,同时公司管理费用与财务费用与去年相比有所增加。2、2024年预计非经常性损益对公司净利润的影响金额约为2,295万元,主要为政府补助。公司将继续加大新产品研发力度,积极拓展市场,加强内部管理,落实降本债券代码:123065债券简称:宝莱转债增效措施,提升管理水平,提升公司核心竞争力和盈利能力

focal_facts.fact: 宝莱特 业绩预告(续亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:6,790万元至9,040万元。
预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:4,500万元至6,750万元。
由于持续受竞争环境、业务模式调整、订单减少等因素影响,公司营业收入与去年相比有所减少。
同时公司管理费用与财务费用与去年相比有所增加。
2024年预计非经常性损益对公司净利润的影响金额约为2,295万元,主要为政府补助。
公司将继续加大新产品研发力度,积极拓展市场,加强内部管理,落实降本增效措施,提升管理水平,提升公司核心竞争力和盈利能力。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Earnings Losses Signal
experiences.description: IF a company reports financial losses THEN anticipate negative returns because it indicates underlying operational issues that may affect investor confidence.

experiences.name: Financial losses overshadow growth potential
experiences.description: IF a company reports ongoing financial losses despite growth potential, THEN anticipate a negative return because investors are likely to focus on current profitability rather than future prospects.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

INPUT.event_text: 利亚德 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.32元至0.43元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:90,000。利亚德 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:0.32元至0.43元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:90,000万元至115,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:85,000万元至110,000万元。 原因:2024年年度净利润亏损的主要原因分析如下:1、2024年公司结合各子公司业务交付情况以及预期经营情况等因素综合考虑,经公司初步测算,根据《会计监管风险提示第8号-商誉减值》《企业会计准则第8号-资产减值》及相关会计政策规定,对其商誉及可辨认无形资产进行减值测试,预计减值金额70,000万元-80,000万元;公司将在年报中详细披露减值测试方法、测试过程和原因,敬请投资者关注。2、国内外市场下游需求不及预期,行业竞争加剧导致产品价格下行,毛利率下降,公司收入和利润均出现不同程度下滑,经公司初步测算,资产减值准备计提有所增加。3、由于经济增长动能偏弱,部分客户经营情况及流动性出现困难,导致应收账款回款不及预期,报告期内信用减值损失计提有所增加。4、2024年度预计非经常性损益对净利润的影响金额约为5,000万元。2024年是公司“技术引领产业布局扩大应用”战略周期的收官之年,也是公司调整业务布局的改革之年,面对外部的不确定性因素,公司采取了一系列措施保障稳健经营,并为未来发展奠定基础,具体来说:1、持续推进Micro技术突破和成本突破,重点研发的50μm以下无衬 之年,也是公司调整业务布局的改革之年,面对外部的不确定性因素,公司采取了一系列措施保障稳健经营,并为未来发展奠定基础,具体来说:1、持续推进Micro技术突破和成本突破,重点研发的50μm以下无衬底芯片的高阶MIP产线已于2024年11月20日正式批量投产,一期产能可达1200KK/月。报告期内,公司Micro LED产品采用MIP和COB两种封装形式;截至12月31日,Micro LED营收超8亿元,连续两年实现订单倍增。2、公司继续高度重视并加大收款力度及资金管理,经初步测算,2024年度经营性现金净流约6亿元;公司可转换

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant expected profit decline THEN the market reaction is likely negative because it indicates financial distress and loss of fair value.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

experiences.name: Asset divestiture signals instability
experiences.description: IF a company divests significant assets in conjunction with poor earnings THEN anticipate negative returns because this often indicates financial distress and a lack of strategic direction, prompting investor caution.

experiences.name: Loss-making business impacts valuation
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with a divestiture of a loss-making unit THEN anticipate negative returns because it reflects a strategic move to improve overall profitability, which may initially be viewed negatively by investors.

INPUT.event_text: ST任子行 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:4,500万元至8,500万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损。ST任子行 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:4,500万元至8,500万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:5,300万元至9,700万元。 原因:(一)报告期内,公司全面推行精细化管理,通过优化组织结构和推动信息化流程化建设,加强各项费用管控力度,“降本增效”措施效果显著,公司各项费用大幅下降。(二)报告期内,公司加大对应收账款的催收力度,应收账款大幅下降,本报告期信用减值损失预计较上年同期下降。(三)报告期内,预计非经常性损益对公司当期净利润的影响金额约为1,200万元,主要为政府补助

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Revenue growth with net losses leads to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong revenue growth but significant net losses, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may prioritize profitability over growth potential, leading to cautious sentiment.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

experiences.name: Profit distribution impacts stock returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong earnings growth WITHOUT profit distribution, THEN expect negative returns because investors may be concerned about future cash flow and reinvestment risks.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Projected losses lead to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

experiences.name: Lack of revenue-generating projects
experiences.description: IF a company announces ongoing projects without revenue generation THEN expect negative returns because it signals weak future earnings potential and investor disappointment.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

INPUT.event_text: 中铁装配 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,200万元至14,000万元,同比上年增长:17.7%至57.67%。。中铁装配 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,200万元至14,000万元,同比上年增长:17.7%至57.67%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:6,200万元至12,000万元,同比上年增长:26.26%至61.9%。 原因:2024年,公司一如既往地坚守着“崇德精业、至善唯勤”的企业精神,坚定不移地贯彻“勇闯天下、使命必达”的企业作风。在这一年里,公司充分利用中进一步深化区域市场的深耕细作。特别是在装配式工程总承包业务方面,公司将其作为核心基石,同时大力拓展装配式钢结构和装配式安居房业务,以多元化的业务布局推动公司整体经营状况的持续优化与提升。通过这一系列的策略实施,公司在2024年取得了显著的经营成果,为未来的可持续发展奠定了坚实的基础。报告期营业收入同比增长约27%,公司预计报告期内归属于上市公司股东的净亏损6,200万元至12,000万元之间,同比减亏幅度为26.26%至61.90%之间

(POSITIVE = the stock rises over the next 5 trading days; NEGATIVE = it falls. Weigh BOTH the event's fundamentals AND the likely market reaction — strong news may already be priced in, weak news may be over-sold.)

[Catalyst] Company: 中铁装配; Catalyst type: earnings (quarterly/annual earnings); Decision time: 2025-01-20
[The event / announcement to react to]
中铁装配 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,200万元至14,000万元,同比上年增长:17.7%至57.67%。。中铁装配 业绩预告(减亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,200万元至14,000万元,同比上年增长:17.7%至57.67%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:6,200万元至12,000万元,同比上年增长:26.26%至61.9%。 原因:2024年,公司一如既往地坚守着“崇德精业、至善唯勤”的企业精神,坚定不移地贯彻“勇闯天下、使命必达”的企业作风。在这一年里,公司充分利用中进一步深化区域市场的深耕细作。特别是在装配式工程总承包业务方面,公司将其作为核心基石,同时大力拓展装配式钢结构和装配式安居房业务,以多元化的业务布局推动公司整体经营状况的持续优化与提升。通过这一系列的策略实施,公司在2024年取得了显著的经营成果,为未来的可持续发展奠定了坚实的基础。报告期营业收入同比增长约27%,公司预计报告期内归属于上市公司股东的净亏损6,200万元至12,000万元之间,同比减亏幅度为26.26%至61.90%之间
[Concurrent events on/near the decision day — consider their JOINT configuration]
  - [2025-01-20 00:00] 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:7,200万元至14,000万元,同比上年增长:17.7%至57.67%
  - [2025-01-20 00:00] 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:6,200万元至12,000万元,同比上年增长:26.26%至61.9%
  - [2025-01-20 00:00] 报告期营业收入同比增长约27%
  - [2025-01-20 00:00] 公司在2024年取得了显著的经营成果,为未来的可持续发展奠定了坚实的基础
[Prior event evidence (disclosures/news) - ALL dated BEFORE the decision time]
  - [2024-10-24 04:31] (300374.SZ) 中铁装配式建筑股份有限公司 2024年第三季度报告 营业收入（元） 本报告期：374,576,087.19 本报告期比上年同期增减：-10.65%
[Similar historical experience (transferable lessons)]
  - [adv +0.20] Profit decline outweighs growth expectations: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.
  - [adv +0.20] Limited production impact leads to profit-taking: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.
  - [adv +0.20] Strong sector performance predicts positive returns: IF a company operates in a high-performing sector and announces major investments THEN anticipate positive stock returns because it reflects the company's commitment to capitalize on sector growth.
  - [adv +0.20] Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.
  - [adv +0.20] Strong growth offsets negative forecasts: IF a company shows strong annual growth and implements shareholder-friendly actions, THEN expect a positive stock return despite negative short-term forecasts because these factors indicate long-term value creation and investor confidence.

FIRST write your full reasoning inside <think></think> tags (reason from the event's fundamentals, prior evidence, experience, and likely market reaction), THEN output JSON:
<think>your step-by-step reasoning over the event content, prior evidence, and experience</think>
{"prob_positive": float in 0-1 (probability the 5-day return is positive), "direction": "positive" or "negative", "reasoning": "brief justification"}

INPUT.event_text: 飞凯材料 业绩预告(预增): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:19,954.39万元至26,144.78万元,同比上年增长:298.89。飞凯材料 业绩预告(预增): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:19,954.39万元至26,144.78万元,同比上年增长:298.89%至422.64%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:20,634.64万元至26,825.03万元,同比上年增长:83.66%至138.76%。 原因:1、2024年度,公司归属于上市公司股东的净利润相较于上年同期实现了增长,主要原因如下:第一,受益于全球集成电路半导体和显示市场下游需求强劲复苏,带动国内半导体封装和显示材料需求稳步提升,公司凭借具有差异化特色优势的电镀液、蚀刻液、锡球、EMC环氧塑封料、液晶与光刻胶等一系列高品质半导体封装和显示材料,进一步扩大半导体封装和显示市场业务规模,领先优势持续提升。第二,报告期内公司积极开发新产品,持续优化研发投向,尤其是在半导体材料和显示材料进口替代领域与重要客户共同开发,提升定制化服务能力的同时,不断丰富产品结构,为客户提供整套解决方案。通过多元化的产品策略,覆盖半导体封装及显示细分应用领域,为后续业绩进一步提升打下坚实基础。第三,2023年度,公司因对已终止的PCBA业务计提减值准备,使得公司2023年归属于上市公司股东的净利润减少14,862.30万元。报告期内,基于实际经营情况,公司计提的减值损失同比大幅下降。第四,报告期内公司深入内部挖潜,持续推进精细化管理,进一步强化成本费用管控,在降低成本费用上取得一定成效,2024年度公司管理费用、 内,基于实际经营情况,公司计提的减值损失同比大幅下降。第四,报告期内公司深入内部挖潜,持续推进精细化管理,进一步强化成本费用管控,在降低成本费用上取得一定成效,2024年度公司管理费用、财务费用等支出与同期相比有所减少。2、经公司初步测算,预计本报告期非经常性损益对归属于上市公司股东的净利润影响金额约为680.25万元,主要为公司收到的政府补助、闲置募集资金现金管理收益等

INPUT.event_text: 迦南科技 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:2,102万元至3,102万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股。迦南科技 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:2,102万元至3,102万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:3,400万元至4,400万元。 原因:1、报告期内,公司积极应对制药装备行业的竞争态势,笃定公司战略和业务策略;公司始终坚持科创定位和高质量发展,不断提升制药装备业务技术营销实力及项目精细化管理水平,持续深耕主业,以优质项目为主线,巩固优势市场,拓展增量市场,强化费用管控。最终促使业务交付量同比增长,整体推动公司营业收入同比增300412长,进一步提升了公司的盈利水平。2、公司预计本期资产减值损失和信用减值损失计提较上年同期减少,最终金额将由公司聘请的审计机构进行审计后确定,后续公司将根据实际情况及相关规则要求,履行计提减值准备的相关披露要求,敬请广大投资者谨慎决策,注意投资风险。3、报告期内,公司预计影响净利润的非经常性损益约为1,298万元

INPUT.prompt:
You are an expert A-share (China) analyst forecasting the SHORT-TERM MARKET REACTION to a corporate event. Given the event below and ONLY pre-event evidence, judge whether the company's stock RETURN over the NEXT 5 TRADING DAYS will be POSITIVE (up) or NEGATIVE (down).
(POSITIVE = the stock rises over the next 5 trading days; NEGATIVE = it falls. Weigh BOTH the event's fundamentals AND the likely market reaction — strong news may already be priced in, weak news may be over-sold.)

[Catalyst] Company: 迦南科技; Catalyst type: earnings (quarterly/annual earnings); Decision time: 2025-01-21
[The event / announcement to react to]
迦南科技 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:2,102万元至3,102万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股。迦南科技 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:2,102万元至3,102万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:3,400万元至4,400万元。 原因:1、报告期内,公司积极应对制药装备行业的竞争态势,笃定公司战略和业务策略;公司始终坚持科创定位和高质量发展,不断提升制药装备业务技术营销实力及项目精细化管理水平,持续深耕主业,以优质项目为主线,巩固优势市场,拓展增量市场,强化费用管控。最终促使业务交付量同比增长,整体推动公司营业收入同比增300412长,进一步提升了公司的盈利水平。2、公司预计本期资产减值损失和信用减值损失计提较上年同期减少,最终金额将由公司聘请的审计机构进行审计后确定,后续公司将根据实际情况及相关规则要求,履行计提减值准备的相关披露要求,敬请广大投资者谨慎决策,注意投资风险。3、报告期内,公司预计影响净利润的非经常性损益约为1,298万元
[Concurrent events on/near the decision day — consider their JOINT configuration]

  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 公司积极应对制药装备行业的竞争态势。
  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 公司始终坚持科创定位和高质量发展。
  - [2025-01-21 00:00] 公司预计影响净利润的非经常性损益约为1,298万元。

  - [2024-10-26 00:00] (300412.SZ) 浙江迦南科技股份有限公司2024年第三季度报告
[Similar historical experience (transferable lessons)]
  - [adv +0.20] Profit decline outweighs growth expectations: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.
  - [adv +0.20] Negative revenue outlook predicts stock decline: IF a company reports a negative revenue outlook, THEN anticipate a decline in stock price because such announcements typically signal underlying business challenges that deter investor confidence.
  - [adv +0.20] Negative outlook impacts stock performance: IF a company issues a negative outlook on profitability THEN anticipate negative returns because such forecasts signal reduced future cash flows and investor confidence.
  - [adv +0.20] Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.
  - [adv +0.20] Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

<think>your step-by-step reasoning over the event content, prior evidence, and experience</think>

INPUT.event_text: 昆仑万维 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:1.14元至1.63元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:139,0。昆仑万维 业绩预告(首亏): 预计2024年1-12月每股收益亏损:1.14元至1.63元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:139,000万元至199,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:141,500万元至201,500万元。 原因:昆仑万维是中国领先的人工智能科技公司,目前业务已经覆盖AGI与AIGC、信息分发、元宇宙、社交娱乐及游戏等多个领域,并凭借在技术研发方面积累的深厚实力,成功构建了搜索、广告、虚拟道具付费、会员订阅等多种商业化变现方式。本报告期公司进一步开拓海外市场,收入继续保持积极增长态势,为多元化AI产品矩阵的拓展奠定了坚实基础。但受公司自身投入加大等影响,本报告期公司业绩阶段性承压,归属于母公司股东净利润同比由盈转亏。具体来讲,为巩固公司在AI领域的领先地位,报告期内研发投入进一步加大,产生的各项短期成本与相关支出在一定程度上影响了本期利润表现;另一方面,投资收益表现亦不及去年同期,金融资产价格波动和投资亏损预计共11亿人民币。以上两大因素综合导致本报告期业绩出现亏损。尽管业绩短期承压,但报告期内公司在AI大模型、AI搜索、AI短剧、AI游戏、AI社交、AI音乐各垂直业务领域,均取得显著成果。AI大模型方面,2024年11月公司重磅推出「天工大模型4.0」o1版与4o版。o1模型(Skywork o1)经过全方位技术升级和模型优化, 各垂直业务领域,均取得显著成果。AI大模型方面,2024年11月公司重磅推出「天工大模型4.0」o1版与4o版。o1模型(Skywork o1)经过全方位技术升级和模型优化,能熟练处理各种推理挑战。拥有4o版(Skywork4o)多模态模型赋能的实时语音对话助手Skyo,为用户带来了流畅实时的对话体验。在天工大模型的赋能下,天工AI智能助手持续迭代升级,充分满足了用户的多样化需求。AI短剧方面,公司打造的SkyReels是集成视频大模型与3D大模型的AI短剧平台,将视频生产、剧情创作与3D技术完美融为一体。该平台为观众带来了前所未有的创作

experiences.name: High revenue but poor profitability signals caution
experiences.description: IF a company shows high revenue growth alongside substantial net losses, THEN anticipate negative market reactions as investors often react negatively to unsustainable growth without profitability.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Uncertainty dampens positive earnings outlook
experiences.description: IF there is significant uncertainty surrounding a company's earnings report (X) THEN anticipate negative stock returns (Y) because investors may react cautiously to potential risks despite prior gains (Z).

experiences.name: Financial losses overshadow growth potential
experiences.description: IF a company reports ongoing financial losses despite growth potential, THEN anticipate a negative return because investors are likely to focus on current profitability rather than future prospects.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Strong profit growth predicts positive returns
experiences.description: IF a company forecasts strong profit growth (X) THEN expect positive stock returns (Y) because it boosts investor confidence and indicates strong operational performance (Z).

experiences.name: Earnings growth at lower end still positive
experiences.description: IF earnings growth is substantial even at the lower end of forecasts THEN positive returns can be expected because investors may overlook minor disappointments in favor of strong overall performance.

experiences.name: Strong profit growth drives positive returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong profit growth AND announces a share buyback plan, THEN expect positive stock returns because these factors indicate financial health and shareholder value enhancement, outweighing minor revenue declines.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Strong growth offsets negative forecasts
experiences.description: IF a company shows strong annual growth and implements shareholder-friendly actions, THEN expect a positive stock return despite negative short-term forecasts because these factors indicate long-term value creation and investor confidence.

INPUT.event_text: 全信股份 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:1,600万元至2,400万元,同比上年下降:80.94%至87.29%。。全信股份 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:1,600万元至2,400万元,同比上年下降:80.94%至87.29%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:1,800万元至2,600万元,同比上年下降:80.53%至86.52%。 原因:受行业周期波动影响,客户单位需求滞后,导致军品业务收入较上年同期减少;此外受客户单位降价要求影响,部分批产产品价格下行结算,导致产品毛利率下滑;公司坚持创新发展,研发持续投入,前期扩充产能产生的长期投资形成的固定费用增加;公司结合市场情况调整产品结构,积极拓展民品市场,报告期内民品业务增长显著,但由于规模占比仍较小,未能对总体业绩形成明显支撑。上述因素综合导致报告期内公司净利润出现明显下滑

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Earnings Losses Signal
experiences.description: IF a company reports financial losses THEN anticipate negative returns because it indicates underlying operational issues that may affect investor confidence.

INPUT.event_text: 华图山鼎 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:3,000万元至4,500万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股。华图山鼎 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:3,000万元至4,500万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:6,000万元至9,000万元。 原因:公司自2023年11月起在建筑设计业务基础上通过全资子公司华图教育科技有限公司开展了非学历培训业务。报告期,房地产市场持续面临调整压力,新房销售同比下降明显,公司建筑设计业务持续面临市场需求减弱、行业竞争加剧、管控难度加大等困难局面,导致建筑设计业务出现亏损;公司积极拓展市场,全面开展非学历培训业务,同时通过科学管理、流程优化等方式不断提高运营效率,非学历培训业务实现盈利。公司净利润与上年同期相比实现扭亏为盈

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments

  - [adv +0.20] Profit decline outweighs growth expectations: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.
  - [adv +0.20] Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.
  - [adv +0.20] Projected losses lead to negative returns: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.
  - [adv +0.20] Earnings Losses Signal: IF a company reports financial losses THEN anticipate negative returns because it indicates underlying operational issues that may affect investor confidence.
  - [adv +0.20] Profit-taking after earnings disappointments: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

INPUT.event_text: 昊志机电 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:4,200万元至6,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股。昊志机电 业绩预告(扭亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:4,200万元至6,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:7,000万元至10,200万元。 原因:1、报告期内,随着消费电子行业景气度逐步回暖,市场需求增加,公司数控雕铣机主轴、PCB钻孔机主轴、PCB成型机主轴、车床主轴、外驱加工中心主轴、转台等产品销售收入较上年同期大幅增长,带动公司整体销售收入较上年大幅增长;同时,公司对经营成本实施有效管控,产品毛利率方面较去年同期有所提升,整体经营能力稳步提高。以上情况综合导致公司2024年度归属于上市公司股东的净利润较上年大幅上涨,并扭亏为盈。2、公司本期资产减值损失和信用减值损失的最终金额将由公司聘请的具备证券期货从业资格的评估机构及审计机构进行评估和审计后确定,后续公司将根据实际情况及相关规则要求,履行计提减值准备的相关披露要求,敬请广大投资者谨慎决策,注意投资风险。3、本报告期,公司预计非经常性损益对归属于上市公司股东的净利润影响金额约为3,500-5000万元,上年同期为4,483.86万元

experiences.name: Negative earnings outlook leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF earnings outlook is unclear or negative THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking and sentiment shifts — investors may sell off shares to lock in profits or mitigate losses.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Negative earnings forecast leads to stock decline
experiences.description: IF a company reports significant losses, THEN the stock price is likely to decrease because it undermines investor confidence in future profitability.

INPUT.event_text: 新美星 业绩预告(略增): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:3,500万元至4,500万元,同比上年增长:5.5%至35.64%。 预计。新美星 业绩预告(略增): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:3,500万元至4,500万元,同比上年增长:5.5%至35.64%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:4,000万元至5,000万元,同比上年增长:71.8%至114.75%。 原因:公司2024年度归属于上市公司股东的净利润预计较上年同期增长71.80%至114.75%,其主要原因如下:(1)公司始终坚持“创新驱动发展、品质赢得市场”的经营理念,为全球用户提供液态产品成套智能装备及产存一体化全面解决方案,得益于技术、品牌、客户、产品矩阵等优势,公司核心业务稳健发展。(2)2024年,公司聚焦核心战略,深耕主营业务,积极响应客户需求,推出了多款吹贴灌旋一体机、亚洲第一台108,000瓶/小时吹灌旋一体机等先进性、“里程碑”产品,进一步巩固了行业领先地位。(3)公司出口业务主要以美元结算,报告期内美元兑人民币汇率波动对公司净利润产证券代码:300509证券简称:新美星生了积极影响

INPUT.event_text: 恒实科技 业绩预告(续盈): 预计2024年1-12月营业收入:130,000万元至140,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损。恒实科技 业绩预告(续盈): 预计2024年1-12月营业收入:130,000万元至140,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:68,000万元至87,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:67,000万元至86,000万元。 原因:1、报告期内,受行业竞争加剧、主要行业客户项目延期及预算缩减等影响,公司主要业务毛利率呈现下降趋势;同时公司收入结构发生变化,低毛利业务占比提高,高毛利业务占比降低,导致整体毛利率有所下降,预计对公司2024年度经营业绩造成不利影响。2、报告期内,受主要客户投资预算缩减及项目延期等因素影响,商誉所在资产组设计业务收入规模减少,毛利率有所下降,同时结合行业未来市场发展情况,公司对商誉资产组2024年度及未来经营业绩、盈利能力进行分析,根据《企业会计准则第8号--资产减值》及相关会计政策规定,基于谨慎性原则,判断相关资产组商誉存在减值迹象。公司本期拟计提商誉减值准备约55,000万元-65,000万元,最终减值计提金额将由公司聘请的专业评估机构及审计机构进行评估和审计后确定。另外,基于谨慎性原则,根据《企业会计准则》和公司会计政策的相关规定,预计计提信用减值、资产减值约13,000万元-18,000万元。3、报告期内,非经常性损益对净利润的影响金额预计约为900万元-1,000万元

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Revenue growth with net losses leads to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports strong revenue growth but significant net losses, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may prioritize profitability over growth potential, leading to cautious sentiment.

experiences.name: Revenue stability impacts stock returns
experiences.description: IF a company shows significant profitability turnaround BUT has concerns about revenue stability, THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize consistent revenue over short-term profit improvements.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Projected losses lead to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant expected profit decline THEN the market reaction is likely negative because it indicates financial distress and loss of fair value.

experiences.name: High P/E with profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant decline in expected net profit AND has a high P/E ratio, THEN expect negative stock returns because investors may perceive the stock as overvalued given the declining profitability.

experiences.name: Concerns over revenue growth impact
experiences.description: IF earnings reports indicate limited revenue growth, THEN anticipate negative market reactions as investors reassess future profitability. This is based on the understanding that stagnant revenue can lead to diminished investor confidence and selling pressure.

INPUT.event_text: 超频三 业绩预告(增亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:32,000万元至39,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司。超频三 业绩预告(增亏): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:32,000万元至39,000万元。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:32,000万元至39,000万元。 原因:报告期内,公司归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损的主要原因如下:1、报告期内,公司核心业务锂离子电池材料业务所属行业竞争加剧,需求增速低于预期,公司产品价格持续承压,导致毛利下降、经营亏损。2、根据企业会计准则及相关会计政策规定,结合公司的实际经营情况,基于谨慎性原则,预计2024年度将计提长期资产减值准备、应收款项信用减值准1备、存货跌价准备等。截至目前相关减值测试尚在进行中,最终计提金额将由公司聘请的具备证券期货从业资格的评估机构及审计机构进行评估和审计后确定。3、报告期内,根据子公司实际经营情况,基于谨慎性原则,调整对未来应纳税所得额的估计,冲回部分已确认的递延所得税资产。4、根据《监管规则适用指引--会计类第3号》相关规定,综合考虑2024年度部分子公司经营亏损、资产减值情况、外部经营环境变化等因素导致超额亏损,预计应收子公司款项未来无法收回,公司将该债权产生的损失金额全部计入归属于母公司所有者的净利润。5、本报告期公司预计非经常性损益对归属于上市公司股东的净利润影响约为200万元

focal_facts.fact: 超频三 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:32,000万元至39,000万元。
超频三 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润亏损:32,000万元至39,000万元。
公司核心业务锂离子电池材料业务所属行业竞争加剧,需求增速低于预期,公司产品价格持续承压,导致毛利下降、经营亏损。
预计2024年度将计提长期资产减值准备、应收款项信用减值准备、存货跌价准备等。
截至目前相关减值测试尚在进行中,最终计提金额将由公司聘请的具备证券期货从业资格的评估机构及审计机构进行评估和审计后确定。
根据子公司实际经营情况,基于谨慎性原则,调整对未来应纳税所得额的估计,冲回部分已确认的递延所得税资产。
预计应收子公司款项未来无法收回,公司将该债权产生的损失金额全部计入归属于母公司所有者的净利润。
公司预计非经常性损益对归属于上市公司股东的净利润影响约为200万元。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: High revenue but poor profitability signals caution
experiences.description: IF a company shows high revenue growth alongside substantial net losses, THEN anticipate negative market reactions as investors often react negatively to unsustainable growth without profitability.

experiences.name: Profit-taking follows negative regulatory news
experiences.description: IF regulatory scrutiny is announced THEN anticipate profit-taking and negative returns because investors often react to perceived risks by selling shares, even if the company's fundamentals remain strong.

experiences.name: Financial losses overshadow growth potential
experiences.description: IF a company reports ongoing financial losses despite growth potential, THEN anticipate a negative return because investors are likely to focus on current profitability rather than future prospects.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Earnings Losses Signal
experiences.description: IF a company reports financial losses THEN anticipate negative returns because it indicates underlying operational issues that may affect investor confidence.

experiences.name: Projected losses lead to negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company projects significant losses THEN expect negative stock returns because such projections typically indicate poor financial health and increased risk of delisting, which negatively impacts investor sentiment.

INPUT.event_text: 卓胜微 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:38,000万元至49,300万元,同比上年下降:56.07%至66.14%。卓胜微 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:38,000万元至49,300万元,同比上年下降:56.07%至66.14%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:36,800万元至47,800万元,同比上年下降:56.35%至66.39%。 原因:1.2024年度,射频前端芯片产业链仍处于寻求库存水位与市场需求保持平稳波动的周期中。上半年,公司在不断巩固并提升原有优势产品市场份额的同时,积极扩大射频模组产品的市场开拓力度;下半年,受下游需求趋向保守和终端更平稳的库存策略影响,射频前端市场淡旺季迹象不显。公司借助高效资源平台业务模式,力争市场机遇积极扩大滤波器产品市场覆盖度,助力公司模组产品业务深入拓展,有效对抗了诸多外部因素带来的压力。2.报告期内,公司预计营业收入44.91亿元,较去年同期增长约2.59%,归属于上市公司股东的净利润较去年同期减少约66.14%-56.07%。其主要原因系:(1)为加快战略落地,芯卓持续加大研发投入和人才储备力度,本报告期研发费用同比增加;(2)随着产品结构变化、芯卓固定资产转固及市场竞争等因素,毛利率同比有所下降。3.预计第四季度毛利率水平与第三季度基本持平。4.报告期内,非经常性损益对归属于公司股东的净利润影响额约为1,605.56万元

focal_facts.fact: 卓胜微 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:38,000万元至49,300万元,同比上年下降:56.07%至66.14%。
预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:36,800万元至47,800万元,同比上年下降:56.35%至66.39%。
预计2024年度,射频前端芯片产业链仍处于寻求库存水位与市场需求保持平稳波动的周期中。
上半年,公司在不断巩固并提升原有优势产品市场份额的同时,积极扩大射频模组产品的市场开拓力度;
下半年,受下游需求趋向保守和终端更平稳的库存策略影响,射频前端市场淡旺季迹象不显。
公司借助高效资源平台业务模式,力争市场机遇积极扩大滤波器产品市场覆盖度,助力公司模组产品业务深入拓展,有效对抗了诸多外部因素带来的压力。
报告期内,公司预计营业收入44.91亿元,较去年同期增长约2.59%,归属于上市公司股东的净利润较去年同期减少约66.14%-56.07%。
其主要原因系:(1)为加快战略落地,芯卓持续加大研发投入和人才储备力度,本报告期研发费用同比增加;
(2)随着产品结构变化、芯卓固定资产转固及市场竞争等因素,毛利率同比有所下降。
预计第四季度毛利率水平与第三季度基本持平。
报告期内,非经常性损益对归属于公司股东的净利润影响额约为1,605.56万元。

INPUT.event_text: 首都在线 业绩预告(略增): 预计2024年1-12月营业收入:132,000万元至144,000万元,同比上年增长:6.17%至15.82%。 预计2024年。首都在线 业绩预告(略增): 预计2024年1-12月营业收入:132,000万元至144,000万元,同比上年增长:6.17%至15.82%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润亏损:27,400万元至30,900万元,同比上年增长:6.64%至17.22%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除后营业收入:132,000万元至144,000万元,同比上年增长:6.17%至15.82%。 原因:(一)2024年收入较上年同期稳中有升,连续五年保持稳健增长2024年,公司笃定前行,全力践行“一体两翼”全面智算转型战略,成效斐然。智算业务收入同比大幅上扬,整体营业收入更是自上市以来,连续五年保持稳健增长的良好态势,这也彰显出公司强劲的发展动力与市场竞争力。在智算转型的征程中,公司坚持核心技术自主创新,深度聚焦新一代万卡推理集群、训练集群、全球智算网络以及国产GPU推理集群等关键产品的研发创新,持续加大资源投入,不断丰富产品矩阵,全方位提升客户上云体验,致力于为用户提供更优质、高效的智算服务。公司积极拓展合作领域,不断深化与头部大模型客户的合作关系,通过建立稳固的战略合作机制,实现双方优势互补、双向赋能,携手共进智算发展新征程。同时,敏锐捕捉人工智能行业发展趋势,大力拓展AIGC等新兴行业客户群体,凭借多元化的产品与服务,稳步扩大智算市场的覆盖率与影响力。公司高度重视与地方的政府协作共建,在国内,以华北、华东、华南、西北为战略核心 AIGC等新兴行业客户群体,凭借多元化的产品与服务,稳步扩大智算市场的覆盖率与影响力。公司高度重视与地方的政府协作共建,在国内,以华北、华东、华南、西北为战略核心的智算节点规模快速扩张;在海外,凭借云互联全球一张网的强大优势,北美达拉斯智算节点顺利建成并成功点亮,进一步夯实了公司在全球智算领域的战略布局。智算云业务收入已成为公司的第二业务增长曲线,与此同时,2024年公司的计算云与IDC业务稳健前行,收入规模在去年的基础上稳步增长。(二)2024年归属于上市公司股东的净利润相比同期亏损减少,亏损小幅缩窄

2024年归属于上市公司股东的净利润相比同期亏损减少,亏损小幅缩窄。

INPUT.event_text: 联盛化学 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:1,700万元至2,200万元,同比上年下降:67.17%至74.63%。。联盛化学 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:1,700万元至2,200万元,同比上年下降:67.17%至74.63%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:2,000万元至2,500万元,同比上年下降:64.84%至71.88%。 原因:2024年度业绩下降的主要原因:(一)报告期内,公司主要产品的总体销量虽然逐步修复,但市场竞争依旧激烈,主要产品销售价格同比出现较大幅度下降,导致毛利率下降,利润下滑。(二)随着公司募投项目的不断投入,报告期内闲置募集资金用于现金管理的金额减少,导致公司本期利息收入较上年同期减少

focal_facts.fact: 联盛化学 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:1,700万元至2,200万元,同比上年下降:67.17%至74.63%
预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:2,000万元至2,500万元,同比上年下降:64.84%至71.88%
报告期内,公司主要产品的总体销量虽然逐步修复,但市场竞争依旧激烈,主要产品销售价格同比出现较大幅度下降,导致毛利率下降,利润下滑。
随着公司募投项目的不断投入,报告期内闲置募集资金用于现金管理的金额减少,导致公司本期利息收入较上年同期减少。

news_facts.fact: 联盛化学发布2024年第三季度报告。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Profit-taking after earnings disappointments
experiences.description: IF a company reports earnings with limited revenue growth, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking behavior from investors who previously gained. This is because investors often sell off shares to lock in profits when growth prospects appear weak.

experiences.name: Core business focus impacts investor confidence
experiences.description: IF a company divests from non-core assets THEN anticipate negative returns because investors may perceive this as a sign of instability or distress rather than a strategic improvement.

experiences.name: Modest earnings growth may disappoint
experiences.description: IF earnings growth is modest amidst significant corporate changes THEN expect negative returns because investors may prioritize stability over growth potential.

INPUT.event_text: 瑞泰新材 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:8,000万元至11,000万元,同比上年下降:76.42%至82.85%。瑞泰新材 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:8,000万元至11,000万元,同比上年下降:76.42%至82.85%。 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:7,600万元至10,600万元,同比上年下降:76.11%至82.87%。 原因:(一)随着近期全球锂电产业整体增速放缓,叠加锂离子电池材料产能持续释放,导致行业竞争加剧,公司最主要产品电池材料价格下降明显。尽管公司不断优化客户结构,加强降本增效,并持续研发新产品新工艺新应用,公司盈利仍出现明显下滑;与此同时,报告期公司的在建和新投产项目较多,导致管理费用和折旧摊销等成本亦明显增加。(二)公司长期股权投资项下的参股上市企业、重要原材料供应商天际股份(002759.SZ)预告其2024年度因计提大额商誉减值,以及主导产品市场价格下降幅度较大等原因而出现亏损12.5亿元-15亿元。在权益法核算下,公司预计将确认投资损失0.75亿元-0.9亿元

focal_facts.fact: 瑞泰新材预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:8,000万元至11,000万元,同比上年下降:76.42%至82.85%。
预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:7,600万元至10,600万元,同比上年下降:76.11%至82.87%。
随着近期全球锂电产业整体增速放缓,叠加锂离子电池材料产能持续释放,导致行业竞争加剧,公司最主要产品电池材料价格下降明显。
公司长期股权投资项下的参股上市企业、重要原材料供应商天际股份(002759.SZ)预告其2024年度因计提大额商誉减值,以及主导产品市场价格下降幅度较大等原因而出现亏损12.5亿元-15亿元。
在权益法核算下,公司预计将确认投资损失0.75亿元-0.9亿元。

news_facts.fact: 瑞泰新材的营业收入为554,164,538.68元，同比下降44.96%。
瑞泰新材(301238)发布2024年第三季度报告。

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs growth expectations
experiences.description: IF annual net profit declines AND no profit distribution THEN expect negative returns because investors prioritize long-term profitability over short-term growth spikes.

experiences.name: Limited production impact leads to profit-taking
experiences.description: IF a company reports stable operations with limited impact from new initiatives, THEN expect negative returns due to profit-taking after prior gains, as investors may lock in profits.

experiences.name: Disappointing forecasts overshadow strong earnings
experiences.description: IF a company announces strong earnings but provides a disappointing profit forecast, THEN expect negative returns because investors may react to the forecast as a signal of future underperformance, leading to profit-taking.

experiences.name: Profit decline predicts negative returns
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant expected profit decline THEN the market reaction is likely negative because it indicates financial distress and loss of fair value.

experiences.name: Profit decline outweighs contract news
experiences.description: IF a company reports a significant profit decline AND faces regulatory issues, THEN expect negative stock returns because the negative fundamentals overshadow any positive news.

INPUT.event_text: 湖南裕能 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:52,000万元至62,000万元,同比上年下降:59.17%至65.75。湖南裕能 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:52,000万元至62,000万元,同比上年下降:59.17%至65.75%。 预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:56,000万元至66,000万元,同比上年下降:58.24%至64.57%。 原因:锂电池产业链在经历2020-2022年的高增长后,2023年以来增速换挡、供需关系发生显著变化。2024年锂电池产业链处于筑底阶段,碳酸锂价格总体震荡下行,磷酸盐正极材料价格同比上年大幅下降,对行业内企业的盈利水平产生较大压力。同时,磷酸盐正极材料行业竞争激烈,行业总体产能利用率仍处于回升过程。在此背景下,公司作为磷酸盐正极材料行业头部企业,保持较高的产能利用率和产销率以满足下游需求。2024年,公司磷酸盐正极材料销量同比增长约40%,持续推进一体化布局和降本增效,并积极实施出海战略。2024年,公司得以保持一定的盈利,但受行业周期及实施股权激励的股份支付费用等因素影响,盈利同比下滑

focal_facts.fact: 湖南裕能 业绩预告(预减): 预计2024年1-12月扣除非经常性损益后的净利润盈利:52,000万元至62,000万元,同比上年下降:59.17%至65.75。
预计2024年1-12月归属于上市公司股东的净利润盈利:56,000万元至66,000万元,同比上年下降:58.24%至64.57%。
锂电池产业链在经历2020-2022年的高增长后,2023年以来增速换挡、供需关系发生显著变化。
2024年锂电池产业链处于筑底阶段,碳酸锂价格总体震荡下行,磷酸盐正极材料价格同比上年大幅下降,对行业内企业的盈利水平产生较大压力。
公司作为磷酸盐正极材料行业头部企业,保持较高的产能利用率和产销率以满足下游需求。
2024年,公司磷酸盐正极材料销量同比增长约40%,持续推进一体化布局和降本增效,并积极实施出海战略。
2024年,公司得以保持一定的盈利,但受行业周期及实施股权激励的股份支付费用等因素影响,盈利同比下滑。
